name: Greek Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the water and tapioca; let stand at least 5 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, in a 4-quart Dutch oven, brown the meat cubes in hot oil; drain off fat.
3. Stir in the tapioca mixture, onions, tomato sauce, wine, brown sugar, garlic salt, cinnamon, and bay leaf.
4. Bring to boiling.
5. Reduce heat; cover and simmer over low heat for 1-1/2 to 2 hours or until meat is tender.
6. Remove bay leaf before serving.
7. Ladle stew into serving bowls. Top each serving with some feta cheese and walnut halves.
